config.name: ADC_USE_CONFIGURATIONS
config.note: When enabled the user must provide a variable named @p adc_configurations of type @p adc_configurations_t.

macro.name: adcIsBufferComplete
macro.brief: Checks if the current callback refers to a full buffer.
macro.param: Pointer to the ADC driver instance.

macro.name: _adc_reset_i
macro.brief: Resumes a thread waiting for conversion completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the ADC driver instance.

macro.name: _adc_reset_s
macro.brief: Resumes a thread waiting for conversion completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the ADC driver instance.

macro.name: _adc_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Wakes up a thread waiting for a conversion state.
macro.param: Pointer to the ADC driver instance.

macro.name: _adc_error_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Wakes up a thread waiting for conversion termination because of an error.
macro.param: Pointer to the ADC driver instance.

macro.name: _adc_isr_half_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code, half buffer event.
macro.param: Pointer to the ADC driver instance.

macro.name: _adc_isr_full_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code, full buffer event.
macro.param: Pointer to the ADC driver instance.

macro.name: _adc_isr_error_code
macro.param: Pointer to the ADC driver instance.

typedef.name: hal_adc_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ADC driver.

typedef.name: hal_adc_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ADC configuration.

typedef.name: adc_conversion_group_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ADC conversion group.

typedef.name: adc_conversion_groups_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing ADC conversion groups.

field.name: num_channels
field.brief: Number of analog channels in the conversion group.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ adc_lld_configuration_group_fields;

field.name: grpsnum
field.brief: Number of conversion groups in the open array.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ adc_lld_config_fields;

field.name: cfgsnum
field.brief: Number of configurations in the open array.

field.name: samples
field.brief: Current samples buffer pointer or @p NULL.

field.name: depth
field.brief: Current samples buffer depth or zero.

field.name: grpp
field.brief: Current conversion group pointer or @p NULL.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ adc_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: adcStartConversionLinearI
adcStartConversionLinear
adcStartConversionCircularI
adcStartConversionCircular
adcStopConversionI
adcStopConversion
adcConvert
adcSynchronizeStateS
method.brief: Synchronizes with an ADC conversion state.
method.details: This function synchronizes with a future occurrence of the specified conversion state. State occurrences are not buffered, the waiting thread must already be waiting when the state is reached.
method.retval: If the requested state has been reached.
If conversion stopped or failed while waiting.

method.name: adcSynchronizeState
method.brief: Synchronizes with an ADC conversion state.
method.details: This function synchronizes with a future occurrence of the specified conversion state. State occurrences are not buffered, the waiting thread must already be waiting when the state is reached.
method.retval: If the requested state has been reached.
If conversion stopped or failed while waiting.

method.name: adcGetEventsX
method.brief: Returns the cached ADC event flags.

method.name: adcGetAndClearEventsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached ADC event flags.
method.param: Mask of events to be returned and cleared.

method.name: adcGetErrorsX
method.brief: Returns the cached ADC error flags.

method.name: adcGetAndClearErrorsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached ADC error flags.
method.param: Mask of errors to be returned and cleared.
